Bash("C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.parse, http.cookiejar

cj = http.cookiejar.CookieJar\(\)
opener = urllib.request.build_opener\(urllib.request.HTTPCookieProcessor\(cj\)\)

# First get login page to get CSRF token
resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/login''\)
html = resp.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8''\)

# Find csrf token
import re
csrf = re.search\(r''name=""csrf_token"".*?value=""\([^""]+\)""'', html\)
if csrf:
    token = csrf.group\(1\)
    print\(''CSRF token found''\)
    
    # Login
    data = urllib.parse.urlencode\({''username'': ''admin'', ''password'': ''admin123'', ''csrf_token'': token}\).encode\(\)
    resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/login'', data\)
    print\(''Login response URL:'', resp.url\)
    
    # Get select-empresa
    resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/select-empresa''\)
    html = resp.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8''\)
    
    for name in [''DEFAULT'', ''DIRE1'', ''DIRE2'', ''DIRE3'', ''APE01'', ''DIRE10'', ''MEDO01'', ''APERG'']:
        if name in html:
            print\(f''  {name}: APARECE''\)
        else:
            print\(f''  {name}: NO aparece''\)
else:
    print\(''No CSRF token found''\)
    print\(html[:500]\)
")

Bash("C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.parse, http.cookiejar, re

cj = http.cookiejar.CookieJar\(\)
opener = urllib.request.build_opener\(urllib.request.HTTPCookieProcessor\(cj\)\)

# Login
resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/login''\)
html = resp.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8''\)
csrf = re.search\(r''name=""csrf_token"".*?value=""\([^""]+\)""'', html\)
token = csrf.group\(1\)
data = urllib.parse.urlencode\({''username'': ''admin'', ''password'': ''admin123'', ''csrf_token'': token}\).encode\(\)
resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/login'', data\)

# Get select-empresa
resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/select-empresa''\)
html = resp.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8''\)

# Find the list-group section
start = html.find\(''list-group''\)
if start > 0:
    section = html[start-50:start+2000]
    print\(section\)
else:
    print\(''list-group not found''\)
    # Print around empresa_id or Empresa
    for marker in [''empresa_id'', ''Empresa'', ''DEFAULT'']:
        idx = html.find\(marker\)
        if idx > 0:
            print\(f''=== Around {marker} ===''\)
            print\(html[max\(0,idx-100\):idx+200]\)
            break
")

import urllib.request, urllib.parse, http.cookiejar, re

cj = http.cookiejar.CookieJar\(\)
opener = urllib.request.build_opener\(urllib.request.HTTPCookieProcessor\(cj\)\)

resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/login''\)
html = resp.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8''\)
csrf = re.search\(r''name=""csrf_token"".*?value=""\([^""]+\)""'', html\)
token = csrf.group\(1\)
data = urllib.parse.urlencode\({''username'': ''admin'', ''password'': ''admin123'', ''csrf_token'': token}\).encode\(\)
resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/login'', data\)

resp = opener.open\(''http://127.0.0.1:5000/select-empresa''\)
html = resp.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8''\)

# Check which theme
if ''xp-window'' in html:
    print\(''THEME: XP''\)
elif ''sidebar'' in html.lower\(\) and ''linear-gradient'' in html:
    print\(''THEME: MODERN''\)
else:
    print\(''THEME: UNKNOWN''\)

# Print first 300 chars of body
body_start = html.find\(''<body''\)
print\(html[body_start:body_start+500]\)
")

Bash("C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import shutil
import os

src = r''C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable''
dst = r''C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable_dist''

# Copy app folder
if os.path.exists\(os.path.join\(dst, ''app''\)\):
    shutil.rmtree\(os.path.join\(dst, ''app''\)\)
shutil.copytree\(os.path.join\(src, ''app''\), os.path.join\(dst, ''app''\)\)

# Copy necessary files
for f in [''run.py'', ''requirements.txt'', ''vero_contable.db'', ''.env'']:
    src_file = os.path.join\(src, f\)
    if os.path.exists\(src_file\):
        shutil.copy2\(src_file, dst\)
        print\(f''Copied: {f}''\)

print\(''Done!''\)
")

Bash("C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import shutil
import os

dist_path = r''C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable_dist\\dist\\Contabilidad''
src_path = r''C:\\APE\\VERO_CONTABLE\\VERO CONTABLE\\CONTA_2\\vero_contable_dist''

# Check if app folder exists in _internal
internal_app = os.path.join\(dist_path, ''_internal'', ''app''\)
if os.path.exists\(internal_app\):
    print\(f''app/ ya existe en _internal''\)
else:
    # Copy app to _internal
    shutil.copytree\(os.path.join\(src_path, ''app''\), internal_app\)
    print\(''Copiado: app/ -> _internal/app/''\)

# Copy db and .env to _internal  
for f in [''vero_contable.db'', ''.env'']:
    src = os.path.join\(src_path, f\)
    dst = os.path.join\(dist_path, ''_internal'', f\)
    if os.path.exists\(src\) and not os.path.exists\(dst\):
        shutil.copy2\(src, dst\)
        print\(f''Copiado: {f} -> _internal/{f}''\)
    elif os.path.exists\(dst\):
        print\(f''{f} ya existe en _internal''\)

print\(''Listo!''\)
")
